titleZh: 上市公司收购管理办法（2020年修正）
titleEn: Measures for the Administration of the Takeover of Listed Companies
shortTitle: 上市公司收购管理办法
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 规范上市公司收购、权益变动、要约收购和管理层收购的基础规章，是控制权交易和持股披露制度的主干文本。
summaryEn: The foundational CSRC rule on takeovers, stake-building, tender offers, and management buyouts of listed companies, forming the backbone of control-transaction and ownership-disclosure regulation.

sources.label: Public English translation (reference)
sources.noteZh: 公开英文译文对应的是该办法早期文本，用作现行 2020 年修正版本的参考英文入口。
sources.noteEn: This public English translation reflects an earlier text of the takeover measures and is provided here as a reference English entry point for the current 2020-amended version.
